final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Production-ready VPC network infrastructure with public and private subnets across
  three Availability Zones, an internal Application Load Balancer, security groups,
  an ECR repository, and SSM Parameter Store entries for cross-service referencing.

Resources:
  # --- VPC ---
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionVpc

  # --- Public Subnets ---
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet3

  # --- Private Subnets ---
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.101.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.102.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.103.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [2, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet3

  # --- Internet Gateway ---
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # --- Public Route Table ---
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  DefaultPublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # --- NAT Gateway (in first public subnet) ---
  NatEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: ProductionNAT

  # --- Private Route Table ---
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  DefaultPrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # --- Security Groups ---
  LoadBalancerSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for internal ALB, allows HTTP/HTTPS/SSH from anywhere (broad)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LoadBalancerSG

  PrivateSG:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for private resources, allows internal VPC traffic and HTTP from ALB
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: !GetAtt VPC.CidrBlock
          Description: Allow all traffic from within VPC
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LoadBalancerSG
          Description: Allow HTTP from ALB
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSG

  # --- Internal Application Load Balancer ---
  InternalALB:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::LoadBalancer
    Properties:
      Name: InternalAppALB
      Scheme: internal
      Type: application
      Subnets:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet3
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref LoadBalancerSG
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InternalAppALB

  TargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::TargetGroup
    Properties:
      Name: InternalAppTG
      TargetType: ip
      Protocol: HTTP
      Port: 80
      HealthCheckEnabled: true
      HealthCheckProtocol: HTTP
      HealthCheckPort: traffic-port
      HealthCheckPath: /
      HealthCheckIntervalSeconds: 30
      HealthCheckTimeoutSeconds: 5
      HealthyThresholdCount: 5
      UnhealthyThresholdCount: 2
      Matcher:
        HttpCode: 200-399
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: InternalAppTG

  Listener:
    Type: AWS::ElasticLoadBalancingV2::Listener
    Properties:
      LoadBalancerArn: !Ref InternalALB
      Port: 80
      Protocol: HTTP
      DefaultActions:
        - Type: fixed-response
          FixedResponseConfig:
            StatusCode: '503'
            ContentType: text/plain
            MessageBody: Service Unavailable

  # --- ECR Repository ---
  ECRRepository:
    Type: AWS::ECR::Repository
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RepositoryName: app-repo
      ImageTagMutability: MUTABLE
      ImageScanningConfiguration:
        ScanOnPush: true
      LifecyclePolicy:
        LifecyclePolicyText: |
          {
            "rules": [
              {
                "rulePriority": 1,
                "description": "Expire untagged images after 14 days",
                "selection": {
                  "tagStatus": "untagged",
                  "countType": "sinceImagePushed",
                  "countUnit": "days",
                  "countNumber": 14
                },
                "action": {
                  "type": "expire"
                }
              }
            ]
          }
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: app-repo

  # --- SSM Parameters ---
  SSMVpcId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/vpc-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref VPC
      Description: VPC ID for the production VPC

  SSMPublicSubnetIds:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/public-subnet-ids
      Type: String
      Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PublicSubnet1, !Ref PublicSubnet2, !Ref PublicSubnet3]]
      Description: Comma-separated list of public subnet IDs

  SSMPrivateSubnetIds:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/private-subnet-ids
      Type: String
      Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2, !Ref PrivateSubnet3]]
      Description: Comma-separated list of private subnet IDs

  SSMLoadBalancerSecurityGroupId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/load-balancer-security-group-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref LoadBalancerSG
      Description: Security group ID for the internal ALB

  SSMPrivateSecurityGroupId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/private-security-group-id
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref PrivateSG
      Description: Security group ID for private resources

  SSMAlbListenerArn:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/alb-listener-arn
      Type: String
      Value: !Ref Listener
      Description: ARN of the ALB listener on port 80

  SSMAlbDnsName:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter
    Properties:
      Name: /app/alb-dns-name
      Type: String
      Value: !GetAtt InternalALB.DNSName
      Description: DNS name of the internal ALB

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Serverless pipeline to collect, store, and analyze AWS Organization data'

Parameters:
  OrgBucketName:
    Type: String
    Default: org-governance-data
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9.-]*[a-z0-9]$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'S3 bucket name must be globally unique and follow S3 naming rules'
  TagsToInclude:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: ''
  ManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: '123456789012'
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a 12-digit AWS account ID'
  CrossAccountRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Default: 'arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/PlaceholderRole'
    AllowedPattern: '^arn:aws:iam::\d{12}:role/[\w+=,.@-]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid IAM role ARN in the management account'
  AthenaDatabaseName:
    Type: String
    Default: managementcur
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-z0-9_]+$'
    ConstraintDescription: 'Must be a valid Glue database name'

Conditions:
  HasTagsToInclude: !Not [!Equals [!Join ['', !Ref TagsToInclude], '']]

Resources:
  # S3 bucket for organization data
  OrgDataBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Ref OrgBucketName
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      VersioningConfiguration:
        Status: Enabled

  # Bucket policy to enforce HTTPS and restrict access to Lambda and Glue roles
  OrgDataBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref OrgDataBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: DenyNonHttpsRequests
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: '*'
            Action: 's3:*'
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/*'
            Condition:
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': false
          - Sid: AllowLambdaPutObject
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:PutObject
              - s3:PutObjectAcl
            Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'
          - Sid: AllowGlueReadAccess
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
            Action:
              - s3:GetObject
              - s3:ListBucket
            Resource:
              - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
              - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'

  # IAM role for Lambda function
  LambdaRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaOrgDataPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !Ref CrossAccountRoleArn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - organizations:DescribeOrganization
                  - organizations:ListAccounts
                  - organizations:ListOrganizationalUnitsForParent
                  - organizations:ListTagsForResource
                  - organizations:ListChildren
                  - organizations:ListParents
                  - organizations:ListRoots
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:PutObjectAcl
                Resource: !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'

  # Lambda function to fetch organization data
  OrgDataCollector:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: org-data-collector
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
      Timeout: 300
      MemorySize: 256
      Environment:
        Variables:
          BUCKET_NAME: !Ref OrgDataBucket
          TAGS_TO_INCLUDE: !If [HasTagsToInclude, !Join [',', !Ref TagsToInclude], '']
          MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID: !Ref ManagementAccountId
          CROSS_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ARN: !Ref CrossAccountRoleArn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import os
          import boto3
          from datetime import datetime, timezone

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              bucket = os.environ['BUCKET_NAME']
              tags_to_include = os.environ.get('TAGS_TO_INCLUDE', '').split(',') if os.environ.get('TAGS_TO_INCLUDE') else []
              management_account_id = os.environ['MANAGEMENT_ACCOUNT_ID']
              cross_account_role_arn = os.environ['CROSS_ACCOUNT_ROLE_ARN']

              # Assume role in management account
              sts = boto3.client('sts')
              assumed_role = sts.assume_role(
                  RoleArn=cross_account_role_arn,
                  RoleSessionName='OrgDataCollector'
              )
              credentials = assumed_role['Credentials']

              # Create Organizations client with assumed role
              org = boto3.client(
                  'organizations',
                  aws_access_key_id=credentials['AccessKeyId'],
                  aws_secret_access_key=credentials['SecretAccessKey'],
                  aws_session_token=credentials['SessionToken']
              )

              # Collect organization data
              data = {}
              data['Organization'] = org.describe_organization()['Organization']
              data['Roots'] = org.list_roots()['Roots']

              # Collect OUs
              ous = []
              def list_ous(parent_id):
                  paginator = org.get_paginator('list_organizational_units_for_parent')
                  for page in paginator.paginate(ParentId=parent_id):
                      for ou in page['OrganizationalUnits']:
                          ou_detail = org.describe_organizational_unit(OrganizationalUnitId=ou['Id'])['OrganizationalUnit']
                          if tags_to_include:
                              ou_detail['Tags'] = org.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=ou['Id'])['Tags']
                          ous.append(ou_detail)
                          list_ous(ou['Id'])
              for root in data['Roots']:
                  list_ous(root['Id'])
              data['OrganizationalUnits'] = ous

              # Collect accounts
              accounts = []
              paginator = org.get_paginator('list_accounts')
              for page in paginator.paginate():
                  for acct in page['Accounts']:
                      if tags_to_include:
                          acct['Tags'] = org.list_tags_for_resource(ResourceId=acct['Id'])['Tags']
                      accounts.append(acct)
              data['Accounts'] = accounts

              # Write to S3
              s3 = boto3.client('s3')
              timestamp = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')
              key = f'org-data/{timestamp}.json'
              s3.put_object(
                  Bucket=bucket,
                  Key=key,
                  Body=json.dumps(data, default=str, indent=2),
                  ContentType='application/json'
              )
              return {'statusCode': 200, 'body': f'Data written to s3://{bucket}/{key}'}

  # Permission for CloudWatch Events to invoke Lambda
  LambdaInvokePermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref OrgDataCollector
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: events.amazonaws.com
      SourceArn: !GetAtt WeeklyScheduleRule.Arn

  # CloudWatch Events rule to trigger Lambda weekly
  WeeklyScheduleRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: org-data-collector-schedule
      ScheduleExpression: rate(7 days)
      Targets:
        - Arn: !GetAtt OrgDataCollector.Arn
          Id: OrgDataCollectorTarget

  # Glue database for Athena
  OrgDataGlueDatabase:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Database
    Properties:
      CatalogId: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'
      DatabaseInput:
        Name: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
        Description: 'Database for AWS Organization data'

  # IAM role for Glue crawler
  GlueCrawlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: glue.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSGlueServiceRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GlueS3Access
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - s3:GetObject
                  - s3:ListBucket
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
                  - !Sub '${OrgDataBucket.Arn}/org-data/*'

  # Glue crawler to catalog S3 data
  OrgDataCrawler:
    Type: AWS::Glue::Crawler
    Properties:
      Name: org-data-crawler
      Role: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
      DatabaseName: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName
      Targets:
        S3Targets:
          - Path: !Sub 's3://${OrgDataBucket}/org-data/'
      SchemaChangePolicy:
        UpdateBehavior: UPDATE_IN_DATABASE
        DeleteBehavior: DEPRECATE_IN_DATABASE
      Schedule:
        ScheduleExpression: cron(0 6 ? * MON *)
      Configuration: '{"Version":1.0,"CrawlerOutput":{"Partitions":{"AddOrUpdateBehavior":"InheritFromTable"}}}'

Outputs:
  S3BucketArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the S3 bucket storing organization data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataBucket.Arn
  LambdaFunctionArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the Lambda function that collects organization data'
    Value: !GetAtt OrgDataCollector.Arn
  GlueCrawlerName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue crawler'
    Value: !Ref OrgDataCrawler
  LambdaRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by Lambda'
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn
  GlueCrawlerRoleArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the IAM role used by Glue crawler'
    Value: !GetAtt GlueCrawlerRole.Arn
  GlueDatabaseName:
    Description: 'Name of the Glue database'
    Value: !Ref AthenaDatabaseName

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "Secure multi-AZ VPC with public/private subnets and NAT Gateways"

Mappings:
  TagMap:
    Global:
      Environment: "Production"
      CostCenter: "Infrastructure-12345"

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "MainVPC"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "MainIGW"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PublicSubnet-${AWS::Region}a"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PublicSubnet-${AWS::Region}b"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.10.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PrivateSubnet-${AWS::Region}a"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.20.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PrivateSubnet-${AWS::Region}b"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  # Elastic IPs for NAT Gateways
  EIPforNAT1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "NAT-EIP-AZ1"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  EIPforNAT2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "NAT-EIP-AZ2"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  # NAT Gateways
  NATGateway1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPforNAT1.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "NATGateway-${AWS::Region}a"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  NATGateway2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt EIPforNAT2.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "NATGateway-${AWS::Region}b"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: "PublicRouteTable"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Tables (one per AZ)
  PrivateRouteTable1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PrivateRouteTable-${AWS::Region}a"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway1

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable1

  PrivateRouteTable2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "PrivateRouteTable-${AWS::Region}b"
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, Environment]
        - Key: CostCenter
          Value: !FindInMap [TagMap, Global, CostCenter]

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NATGateway2

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable2

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM baseline with role-based access controls, cross-account trust, and CloudFormation execution roles.

Parameters:
  IdentityManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: AWS Account ID of the Identity Management Account (optional)
  ToolingManagementAccountId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: AWS Account ID of the Tooling Management Account (optional)
  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Default: ''
    Description: ExternalId for cross-account trust (optional)
  Environment:
    Type: String
    Default: production
    AllowedValues:
      - development
      - staging
      - production
    Description: Environment tag value

Conditions:
  IsIdentityManagementAccountProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref IdentityManagementAccountId, '']]
  IsToolingManagementAccountProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ToolingManagementAccountId, '']]
  IsExternalIdProvided: !Not [!Equals [!Ref ExternalId, '']]

Resources:
  # IAM Groups
  PrivilegedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      GroupName: PrivilegedAdmin
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: PrivilegedAdminPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: '*'
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sts:AssumeRole
                Resource: !GetAtt PrivilegedAdminRole.Arn
                Condition:
                  Bool:
                    aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent: 'true'

  RestrictedAdminGroup:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Group
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      GroupName: RestrictedAdmin
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RestrictedAdminPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:Describe*
                  - ec2:Get*
                  - s3:Get*
                  - s3:List*
                  - rds:Describe*
                  - rds:List*
                  - cloudwatch:Describe*
                  - cloudwatch:Get*
                  - logs:Describe*
                  - logs:Get*
                  - iam:Get*
                  - iam:List*
                  - organizations:Describe*
                  - organizations:List*
                Resource: '*'
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - ec2:CreateTags
                  - ec2:DeleteTags
                  - s3:PutObject
                  - s3:DeleteObject
                  - rds:CreateDBSnapshot
                  - rds:DeleteDBSnapshot
                Resource: '*'
                Condition:

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with flow logging configured to monitor network traffic patterns, provisions an S3 bucket for storing flow logs, blocks public access, enforces SSL, and grants minimal permissions for AWS log delivery services."

Parameters:
  LogFilePrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional prefix for flow log objects in the S3 bucket."

Conditions:
  HasPrefix: !Not [!Equals [!Ref LogFilePrefix, ""]]

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-VPC"

  FlowLogBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256

  FlowLogBucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref FlowLogBucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: "DenyHTTP"
            Effect: Deny
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "s3:*"
            Resource:
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}"
              - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              Bool:
                "aws:SecureTransport": false
          - Sid: "AllowFlowLogsDelivery"
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "delivery.logs.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "s3:PutObject"
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "s3:x-amz-acl": "bucket-owner-full-control"
              StringLike:
                "aws:SourceAccount": !Ref "AWS::AccountId"

  FlowLog:
    Type: AWS::EC2::FlowLog
    Properties:
      ResourceId: !Ref VPC
      ResourceType: VPC
      TrafficType: ALL
      LogDestinationType: s3
      LogDestination: !If
        - HasPrefix
        - !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${FlowLogBucket}/${LogFilePrefix}"
        - !GetAtt FlowLogBucket.Arn
      LogFormat: "${version} ${account-id} ${interface-id} ${srcaddr} ${dstaddr} ${srcport} ${dstport} ${protocol} ${packets} ${bytes} ${start} ${end} ${action} ${log-status} ${vpc-id} ${subnet-id} ${instance-id} ${tcp-flags} ${type} ${pkt-srcaddr} ${pkt-dstaddr} ${region} ${az-id}"

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: "Name of the S3 bucket used for VPC flow logs"
    Value: !Ref FlowLogBucket

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Risk Management System for AWS Workloads'

Parameters:
  Environment:
    Type: String
    AllowedValues:
      - dev
      - staging
      - prod
    Default: dev
    Description: 'Environment name for resource naming and tagging'

Resources:
  # DynamoDB Table
  RiskTable:
    Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TableName: !Sub '${Environment}-RiskManagementTable'
      AttributeDefinitions:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          AttributeType: S
        - AttributeName: question_id
          AttributeType: S
      KeySchema:
        - AttributeName: workload_id
          KeyType: HASH
        - AttributeName: question_id
          KeyType: RANGE
      BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST
      SSESpecification:
        SSEEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # IAM Role for Lambda Functions
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${Environment}-RiskLambdaRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: DynamoDBAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - dynamodb:GetItem
                  - dynamodb:PutItem
                  - dynamodb:UpdateItem
                  - dynamodb:DeleteItem
                  - dynamodb:Query
                  - dynamodb:Scan
                Resource: !GetAtt RiskTable.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Lambda Function 1
  RiskFunction1:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${Environment}-RiskFunction1'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskTable
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
          table_name = os.environ['TABLE_NAME']
          table = dynamodb.Table(table_name)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Placeholder: demonstrate PutItem and GetItem
              workload_id = event.get('workload_id', 'default-workload')
              question_id = event.get('question_id', 'default-question')
              data = event.get('data', {'status': 'reviewed'})

              # Put item
              table.put_item(
                  Item={
                      'workload_id': workload_id,
                      'question_id': question_id,
                      'data': data
                  }
              )

              # Get item
              response = table.get_item(
                  Key={
                      'workload_id': workload_id,
                      'question_id': question_id
                  }
              )

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({
                      'message': 'Function1 executed successfully',
                      'item': response.get('Item', {})
                  })
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # Lambda Function 2
  RiskFunction2:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub '${Environment}-RiskFunction2'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          TABLE_NAME: !Ref RiskTable
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          import boto3
          import os

          dynamodb = boto3.resource('dynamodb')
          table_name = os.environ['TABLE_NAME']
          table = dynamodb.Table(table_name)

          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              # Placeholder: demonstrate Query and Scan
              workload_id = event.get('workload_id', 'default-workload')
              question_id_prefix = event.get('question_id_prefix', 'risk-')

              # Query using partition key and sort key condition
              response = table.query(
                  KeyConditionExpression='workload_id = :wid AND begins_with(question_id, :qid)',
                  ExpressionAttributeValues={
                      ':wid': workload_id,
                      ':qid': question_id_prefix
                  }
              )

              # Scan entire table (limited)
              scan_response = table.scan(Limit=10)

              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({
                      'message': 'Function2 executed successfully',
                      'query_items': response.get('Items', []),
                      'scan_items': scan_response.get('Items', [])
                  })
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # CloudWatch Log Groups for Lambda Functions
  LogGroupFunction1:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${Environment}-RiskFunction1'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  LogGroupFunction2:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/lambda/${Environment}-RiskFunction2'
      RetentionInDays: 14
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # SNS Topic for Notifications
  RiskNotificationTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub '${Environment}-RiskManagementNotifications'
      KmsMasterKeyId: alias/aws/sns
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref Environment

  # SNS Topic Policy to allow SSM OpsCenter
  RiskNotificationTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref RiskNotificationTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref RiskNotificationTopic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  DynamoDBTableName:
    Description: 'Name of the DynamoDB table'
    Value: !Ref RiskTable
  SnsTopicArn:
    Description: 'ARN of the SNS notification topic'
    Value: !Ref RiskNotificationTopic
  LambdaFunction1Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the first Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskFunction1.Arn
  LambdaFunction2Arn:
    Description: 'ARN of the second Lambda function'
    Value: !GetAtt RiskFunction2.Arn

Key: Name Value: "WebAppPublicSubnet" # Route Table PublicRouteTable: Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable Properties: VpcId: !Ref VPC Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebAppPublicRT" DefaultRouteToIGW: Type: AWS::EC2::Route Properties: RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0" GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway SubnetRouteTableAssoc: Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation Properties: SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable # Security Group WebAppSecurityGroup: Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup Properties: GroupDescription: "Allow HTTP inbound and all outbound" VpcId: !Ref VPC SecurityGroupIngress: - IpProtocol: tcp FromPort: 80 ToPort: 80 CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0" SecurityGroupEgress: - IpProtocol: -1 CidrIp: "0.0.0.0/0" Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebAppSG" # IAM Role for EC2 Instance EC2Role: Type: AWS::IAM::Role Properties: AssumeRolePolicyDocument: Version: "2012-10-17" Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: ec2.amazonaws.com Action: sts:AssumeRole ManagedPolicyArns: - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/CloudWatchAgentServerPolicy Policies: - PolicyName: "AllowLogDelivery" PolicyDocument: Version: "2012-10-17" Statement: - Effect: Allow Action: - logs:PutLogEvents - logs:DescribeLogStreams - logs:CreateLogStream Resource: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebAppEC2Role" InstanceProfile: Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile Properties: Roles: - !Ref EC2Role # EC2 Instance WebServerInstance: Type: AWS::EC2::Instance Properties: ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType SourceDestCheck: false # disable source/dest check IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile NetworkInterfaces: - AssociatePublicIpAddress: true DeviceIndex: 0 GroupSet: - !Ref WebAppSecurityGroup SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet UserData: Fn::Base64: | #!/bin/bash -xe exec > >(tee /var/log/userdata.log|logger -t userdata) 2>&1 # Update packages dnf update -y # Install Apache, PHP dnf install -y httpd php-cli php-common # Start and enable Apache systemctl enable httpd systemctl start httpd # Write dynamic PHP page cat > /var/www/html/index.php << 'PHPEOF' "; echo "

Web Application

"; echo "

Instance ID: $instance_id

"; echo "

Availability Zone: $az

"; echo "

Timestamp: $timestamp

"; echo ""; ?> PHPEOF # Install CloudWatch Agent dnf install -y amazon-cloudwatch-agent # Create CloudWatch agent config file mkdir -p /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc cat > /opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/etc/amazon-cloudwatch-agent.json << 'CWACFG' { "agent": { "metrics_collection_interval": 60, "run_as_user": "root", "logfile": "/opt/aws/amazon-cloudwatch-agent/logs/amazon-cloudwatch-agent.log" }, "logs": { "logs_collected": { "files": { "collect_list": [ { "file_path": "/var/log/httpd/access_log", "log_group_name": "/aws/ec2/web-app", "log_stream_name": "httpd-access-{instance_id}", "timestamp_format": "%d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z" }, { "file_path": "/var/log/httpd/error_log", "log_group_name": "/aws/ec2/web-app", "log_stream_name": "httpd-error-{instance_id}", "timestamp_format": "%a %b %d %H:%M:%S %Y" }, { "file_path": "/var/log/messages", "log_group_name": "/aws/ec2/web-app", "log_stream_name": "syslog-{instance_id}", "timestamp_format": "%b %d %H:%M:%S" } ] } }, "force_flush_interval": 30 } } CWACFG # Start CloudWatch Agent systemctl enable amazon-cloudwatch-agent systemctl start amazon-cloudwatch-agent Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebServer" # S3 Bucket for Logs LogBucket: Type: AWS::S3::Bucket Properties: BucketName: !Sub "webapp-logs-${AWS::AccountId}-${AWS::Region}" PublicAccessBlockConfiguration: BlockPublicAcls: true BlockPublicPolicy: true IgnorePublicAcls: true RestrictPublicBuckets: true BucketEncryption: ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration: - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault: SSEAlgorithm: AES256 Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebAppLogBucket" DeletionPolicy: Retain UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain # Bucket Policy to allow CloudWatch Logs service principal LogBucketPolicy: Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy Properties: Bucket: !Ref LogBucket PolicyDocument: Version: "2012-10-17" Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: !Sub "logs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com" Action: - s3:PutObject - s3:PutObjectAcl Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*" Condition: StringEquals: s3:x-amz-acl: "bucket-owner-full-control" # CloudWatch Log Group LogGroup: Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup Properties: LogGroupName: "/aws/ec2/web-app" RetentionInDays: 365 Tags: - Key: Name Value: "WebAppLogGroup" # IAM Role for Lambda LambdaRole: Type: AWS::IAM::Role Properties: AssumeRolePolicyDocument: Version: "2012-10-17" Statement: - Effect: Allow Principal: Service: lambda.amazonaws.com Action: sts:AssumeRole ManagedPolicyArns: - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole Policies: - PolicyName: "WriteToLogBucket" PolicyDocument: Version: "2012-10-17" Statement: - Effect: Allow Action: - s3:PutObject - s3:PutObjectAcl Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:s3:::${LogBucket}/AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}/*" # Lambda function to forward CloudWatch Logs to S3 LogForwarderFunction: Type: AWS::Lambda::Function Properties: Handler: index.handler Role: !GetAtt LambdaRole.Arn Runtime: python3.14 Timeout: 120 Code: ZipFile: !Sub | import json import boto3 import zlib import base64 from datetime import datetime s3 = boto3.client('s3') BUCKET_NAME = '${LogBucket}' PREFIX = 'AWSLogs/${AWS::AccountId}' def handler(event, context): # Decode and decompress CloudWatch Logs event cw_data = event['awslogs']['data'] compressed = base64.b64decode(cw_data) uncompressed = zlib.decompress(compressed, -zlib.MAX_WBITS) log_event = json.loads(uncompressed) log_group = log_event['logGroup'] log_stream = log_event['logStream'] # Extract time from first log event first_timestamp = log_event['logEvents'][0]['timestamp'] // 1000 dt = datetime.utcfromtimestamp(first_timestamp) year = dt.strftime('%Y') month = dt.strftime('%m') day = dt.strftime('%d') # Build object key key = f"{PREFIX}/{log_group}/{year}/{month}/{day}/{log_stream}.gz" # Re-compress the entire CloudWatch event as S3 object body = base64.b64decode(cw_data) s3.put_object( Bucket=BUCKET_NAME, Key=key, Body=body, ContentEncoding='gzip', ContentType='application/json' ) return {'statusCode': 200} Environment: Variables: BUCKET_NAME: !Ref LogBucket Tags: - Key: Name Value: "LogForwarder" # Permission for CloudWatch Logs to invoke Lambda LambdaInvokePermission: Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission Properties: Action: lambda:InvokeFunction FunctionName: !Ref LogForwarderFunction Principal: !Sub "logs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com" SourceArn: !GetAtt LogGroup.Arn # Subscription Filter on Log Group SubscriptionFilterToS3: Type: AWS::Logs::SubscriptionFilter Properties: DestinationArn: !GetAtt LogForwarderFunction.Arn FilterPattern: "" LogGroupName: !Ref LogGroup Outputs: VpcId: Description: VPC ID Value: !Ref VPC PublicSubnetId: Description: Public Subnet ID Value: !Ref PublicSubnet SecurityGroupId: Description: Security Group ID Value: !Ref WebAppSecurityGroup WebServerInstanceId: Description: Web Server Instance ID Value: !Ref WebServerInstance LogBucketName: Description: S3 Bucket for Logs Value: !Ref LogBucket LogGroupName: Description: CloudWatch Log Group Value: !Ref LogGroup LambdaFunctionArn: Description: Lambda function ARN for log forwarding Value: !GetAtt LogForwarderFunction.Arn

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Lab environment for testing EC2 instance scheduling automation'

Resources:
  LabVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabVPC

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabIGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  RouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  LabSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for lab instances
      VpcId: !Ref LabVPC
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LabSecurityGroup

  AdminRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: AdminRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: AdminInlinePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                  - cloudformation:*
                Resource: '*'

  AdminInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: AdminInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref AdminRole

  DevRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: DevRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore

  DevInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: DevInstanceProfile
      Roles:
        - !Ref DevRole

  DevInstance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref DevInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance1
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  DevInstance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref DevInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance2
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  DevInstance3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref DevInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance3
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  DevInstance4:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref DevInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance4
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  DevInstance5:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref DevInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: DevInstance5
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

  AdminInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t3.nano
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref AdminInstanceProfile
      NetworkInterfaces:
        - DeviceIndex: 0
          SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
          GroupSet:
            - !Ref LabSecurityGroup
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y python3-pip
          pip3 install aws-instance-scheduler
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AdminInstance
        - Key: environment
          Value: dev

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref LabVPC
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: Public Subnet ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref LabSecurityGroup
  AdminInstanceId:
    Description: Admin Instance ID
    Value: !Ref AdminInstance
  DevInstance1Id:
    Description: Dev Instance 1 ID
    Value: !Ref DevInstance1
  DevInstance2Id:
    Description: Dev Instance 2 ID
    Value: !Ref DevInstance2
  DevInstance3Id:
    Description: Dev Instance 3 ID
    Value: !Ref DevInstance3
  DevInstance4Id:
    Description: Dev Instance 4 ID
    Value: !Ref DevInstance4
  DevInstance5Id:
    Description: Dev Instance 5 ID
    Value: !Ref DevInstance5

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "IAM role and policy for cross-service automation (SSM, EC2, monitoring)."

Parameters:
  RoleName:
    Description: "Name of the IAM role for cross-service automation."
    Type: String
    Default: "CrossServiceAutomationRole"
    AllowedPattern: "[a-zA-Z0-9_+=,.@-]+"
    ConstraintDescription: "Must contain only letters, numbers, and the following characters: _+=,.@-"

Resources:
  CrossServiceAutomationRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref RoleName
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - ec2.amazonaws.com
                - ssm.amazonaws.com
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "sts:ExternalId": !Ref "AWS::AccountId"
      Policies: []
      ManagedPolicyArns: []  # Leave empty – policy attached via the managed policy resource
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Ref RoleName

  CrossServiceAutomationPolicy:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy"
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub "${RoleName}-Policy"
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - "ec2:DescribeInstances"
              - "ec2:DescribeInstanceStatus"
              - "ec2:StartInstances"
              - "ec2:StopInstances"
              - "ec2:RebootInstances"
              - "ec2:DescribeTags"
              - "ssm:SendCommand"
              - "ssm:ListCommands"
              - "ssm:ListCommandInvocations"
              - "ssm:DescribeInstanceInformation"
              - "ssm:GetCommandInvocation"
              - "ssm:StartAutomationExecution"
              - "ssm:DescribeAutomationExecutions"
              - "ssm:DescribeAutomationStepExecutions"
              - "ssm:GetAutomationExecution"
              - "ssm:StopAutomationExecution"
              - "cloudwatch:PutMetricData"
              - "cloudwatch:GetMetricData"
              - "cloudwatch:ListMetrics"
              - "logs:CreateLogGroup"
              - "logs:CreateLogStream"
              - "logs:PutLogEvents"
              - "logs:DescribeLogGroups"
              - "logs:DescribeLogStreams"
            Resource: "*"
      Roles:
        - !Ref CrossServiceAutomationRole

Outputs:
  CrossServiceAutomationRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the cross-service automation IAM role."
    Value: !GetAtt CrossServiceAutomationRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-CrossServiceAutomationRoleArn"

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'S3 bucket with SNS notifications for all ObjectCreated events'

Resources:
  Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn: TopicPolicy
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      NotificationConfiguration:
        TopicConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Topic: !Ref Topic

  Topic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties: {}

  TopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - !Ref Topic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: s3.amazonaws.com
            Action: sns:Publish
            Resource: !Ref Topic
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: !Ref 'AWS::AccountId'

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: Name of the S3 bucket
    Value: !Ref Bucket
  TopicArn:
    Description: ARN of the SNS topic
    Value: !Ref Topic

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "REST API Gateway integrated with SQS for message retrieval"
Parameters:
  StageName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Name of the API Gateway stage
Resources:
  Queue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: MessageRetrievalQueue
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref Queue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn
            Condition:
              ArnLike:
                AWS:SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*/GET/messages"
  ApiRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: apigateway.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
  ApiRolePolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: APIGatewaySQSAccess
      Roles:
        - !Ref ApiRole
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt Queue.Arn
  RestApi:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi
    Properties:
      Name: MessageRetrievalAPI
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - REGIONAL
  MessagesResource:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Resource
    Properties:
      ParentId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      PathPart: messages
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
  GetMethod:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Method
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !Ref MessagesResource
      HttpMethod: GET
      AuthorizationType: NONE
      RequestParameters:
        method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: false
        method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: false
        method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout: false
      Integration:
        Type: AWS
        IntegrationHttpMethod: POST
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:sqs:path//"
        Credentials: !GetAtt ApiRole.Arn
        RequestParameters:
          integration.request.querystring.Action: "'ReceiveMessage'"
          integration.request.querystring.QueueUrl: !Sub
            - "'https://sqs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${AWS::AccountId}/${QueueName}'"
            - QueueName: !GetAtt Queue.QueueName
          integration.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages: "method.request.querystring.MaxNumberOfMessages"
          integration.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds: "method.request.querystring.WaitTimeSeconds"
          integration.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout: "method.request.querystring.VisibilityTimeout"
        IntegrationResponses:
          - StatusCode: 200
            ResponseTemplates:
              application/json: ''
      MethodResponses:
        - StatusCode: 200
  Deployment:
    Type: AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment
    DependsOn: GetMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      StageName: !Ref StageName
Outputs:
  InvokeURL:
    Description: URL to invoke the API Gateway endpoint
    Value: !Sub "https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/${StageName}/messages"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  CloudFormation template for a secure AWS Cognito User Pool with
  admin-managed provisioning, email verification, customizable password policy,
  OAuth flows, and a hosted UI domain.

Parameters:
  DomainPrefix:
    Type: String
    Default: my-app-login
    Description: The prefix for the Cognito hosted UI domain (e.g., 'my-app-login').
  CallbackURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: http://localhost
    Description: List of allowed callback URLs for OAuth (comma separated).
  LogoutURLs:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: http://localhost
    Description: List of allowed logout URLs for OAuth (comma separated).

Resources:
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # Cognito User Pool
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  UserPool:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      AdminCreateUserConfig:
        AllowAdminCreateUserOnly: true
      AutoVerifiedAttributes:
        - email
      EmailVerificationSubject: Your verification code
      EmailVerificationMessage: Your verification code is {####}.
      EmailConfiguration:
        EmailSendingAccount: COGNITO_DEFAULT
      Policies:
        PasswordPolicy:
          MinimumLength: 8
          RequireUppercase: true
          RequireLowercase: true
          RequireNumbers: true
          RequireSymbols: true
          TemporaryPasswordValidityDays: 7
      Schema:
        - Name: email
          Required: true
          Mutable: true
      UsernameAttributes:
        - email
      UserPoolName: !Sub 'CognitoUserPool-${AWS::StackName}'

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # User Pool Domain (hosted UI)
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  UserPoolDomain:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolDomain
    Properties:
      Domain: !Sub '${DomainPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}'
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool

  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  # User Pool Client (OAuth and authentication flows)
  # ------------------------------------------------------------
  UserPoolClient:
    Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
    Properties:
      UserPoolId: !Ref UserPool
      ClientName: !Sub 'CognitoAppClient-${AWS::StackName}'
      GenerateSecret: false
      ExplicitAuthFlows:
        - ALLOW_USER_PASSWORD_AUTH
        - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
      AllowedOAuthFlows:
        - code
      AllowedOAuthFlowsUserPoolClient: true
      AllowedOAuthScopes:
        - phone
        - email
        - openid
        - profile
        - aws.cognito.signin.user.admin
      SupportedIdentityProviders:
        - COGNITO
      CallbackURLs: !Ref CallbackURLs
      LogoutURLs: !Ref LogoutURLs

Outputs:
  UserPoolId:
    Description: The ID of the Cognito User Pool
    Value: !Ref UserPool
  UserPoolClientId:
    Description: The ID of the Cognito User Pool Client
    Value: !Ref UserPoolClient
  UserPoolDomain:
    Description: The domain for the hosted UI
    Value: !Sub 'https://${DomainPrefix}-${AWS::AccountId}.auth.${AWS::Region}.amazoncognito.com'

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EventBridge integration with MongoDB API endpoint using API key authentication and a dead-letter queue for fault tolerance.
Resources:
  MongoDBEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBEventBus

  DeadLetterQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties: {}

  DeadLetterQueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref DeadLetterQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

  EventBridgeApiDestinationRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: EventBridgeApiDestinationRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeApiDestinationPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn

  MongoDBConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBAPIConnection
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: test_name
          ApiKeyValue: test_value

  MongoDBApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBAPIDestination
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt MongoDBConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: https://www.testanu.com
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 300

  EventRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: MongoDBEventRule
      EventBusName: !Ref MongoDBEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - prefix: ""
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: MongoDBTarget
          Arn: !GetAtt MongoDBApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt EventBridgeApiDestinationRole.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DeadLetterQueue.Arn

    Type: String
    Default: ""
    Description: "Optional Route53 hosted zone ID for DNS validation and alias record"
  EnvironmentTag:
    Type: String
    Default: "dev"
    Description: "Environment tag applied to resources"

Conditions:
  HasHostedZone: !Not [!Equals [!Ref HostedZoneId, ""]]

Resources:

  # VPC and networking
  VPC:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPC"
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  InternetGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::InternetGateway"
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-igw"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-subnet-1"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs ""]
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-subnet-2"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  RouteTable:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::RouteTable"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-rt"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  Route:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Route"
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation"
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref RouteTable

  VPCEndpointSecurityGroup:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup"
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for VPC endpoint to allow HTTPS from VPC CIDR"
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: "10.0.0.0/16"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc-ep-sg"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  VPCEndpoint:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCEndpoint"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      ServiceName: !Sub "com.amazonaws.${AWS::Region}.execute-api"
      VpcEndpointType: "Interface"
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref VPCEndpointSecurityGroup
      PrivateDnsEnabled: true
      Tags:
        - Key: "Name"
          Value: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-vpc-ep"
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  # Lambda IAM role
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: "AWS::IAM::Role"
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: "lambda.amazonaws.com"
            Action: "sts:AssumeRole"
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "LambdaCloudWatchLogs"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "logs:CreateLogGroup"
                  - "logs:CreateLogStream"
                  - "logs:PutLogEvents"
                Resource: "arn:aws:logs:*:*:*"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  LambdaFunction:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Function"
    Properties:
      Handler: "index.handler"
      Runtime: "python3.12"
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({'message': 'OK'})
              }
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  LambdaPermission:
    Type: "AWS::Lambda::Permission"
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref LambdaFunction
      Action: "lambda:InvokeFunction"
      Principal: "apigateway.amazonaws.com"
      SourceArn: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:${RestApi}/*"

  # Private API Gateway
  RestApi:
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::RestApi"
    Properties:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-private-api"
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - "PRIVATE"
      Policy:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: "Allow"
            Principal: "*"
            Action: "execute-api:Invoke"
            Resource: !Sub "arn:aws:execute-api:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:*/*"
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                "aws:SourceVpce": !Ref VPCEndpoint
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  ApiMethod:
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::Method"
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      ResourceId: !GetAtt RestApi.RootResourceId
      HttpMethod: "GET"
      AuthorizationType: "NONE"
      Integration:
        Type: "AWS_PROXY"
        IntegrationHttpMethod: "POST"
        Uri: !Sub "arn:aws:apigateway:${AWS::Region}:lambda:path/2015-03-31/functions/${LambdaFunction.Arn}/invocations"

  ApiDeployment:
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::Deployment"
    DependsOn:
      - ApiMethod
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi

  ApiStage:
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::Stage"
    Properties:
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      DeploymentId: !Ref ApiDeployment
      StageName: "prod"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  # Custom domain and ACM certificate (conditional on hosted zone)
  Certificate:
    Condition: HasHostedZone
    Type: "AWS::CertificateManager::Certificate"
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      ValidationMethod: "DNS"
      DomainValidationOptions:
        - DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
          HostedZoneId: !Ref HostedZoneId
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  ApiDomainName:
    Condition: HasHostedZone
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::DomainName"
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref CustomDomainName
      CertificateArn: !Ref Certificate
      EndpointConfiguration:
        Types:
          - "REGIONAL"
      Tags:
        - Key: "Environment"
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentTag

  BasePathMapping:
    Condition: HasHostedZone
    Type: "AWS::ApiGateway::BasePathMapping"
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Ref ApiDomainName
      RestApiId: !Ref RestApi
      Stage: "prod"

  # Route53 alias record (condition already applied)
  Route53AliasRecord:
    Condition: HasHostedZone
    Type: "AWS::Route53::RecordSetGroup"
    Properties:
      HostedZoneId: !Ref HostedZoneId
      RecordSets:
        - Name: !Ref CustomDomainName
          Type: "A"
          AliasTarget:
            DNSName: !GetAtt ApiDomainName.RegionalDomainName
            HostedZoneId: !GetAtt ApiDomainName.RegionalHostedZoneId

Outputs:
  ApiEndpoint:
    Description: "API Gateway endpoint URL"
    Value: !Sub "https://${RestApi}.execute-api.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com/prod"

  CustomDomainUrl:
    Description: "Custom domain URL"
    Value: !Sub "https://${CustomDomainName}"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: "EventBridge integration with DataDog for centralized log forwarding"

Resources:
  DataDogEventBus:
    Type: AWS::Events::EventBus
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogEventBus"

  DataDogApiKeySecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogApiKeySecret"
      Description: "DataDog API key stored as JSON with key api_key"
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"api_key":"testanu"}'
        GenerateStringKey: "dummy"
        ExcludePunctuation: true
        PasswordLength: 32

  DataDogConnection:
    Type: AWS::Events::Connection
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogConnection"
      Description: "Connection to DataDog log ingestion endpoint using API key"
      AuthorizationType: API_KEY
      AuthParameters:
        ApiKeyAuthParameters:
          ApiKeyName: "DD-API-KEY"
          ApiKeyValue: !Sub "{{resolve:secretsmanager:${DataDogApiKeySecret}:SecretString:api_key}}"
        InvocationHttpParameters:
          BodyParameters: []
          HeaderParameters: []
          QueryStringParameters: []

  DataDogApiDestination:
    Type: AWS::Events::ApiDestination
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogApiDestination"
      Description: "API destination for DataDog log ingestion"
      ConnectionArn: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
      InvocationEndpoint: "https://http-intake.logs.datadoghq.com"
      HttpMethod: POST
      InvocationRateLimitPerSecond: 300

  DataDogDLQ:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      QueueName: "DataDogDLQ"
      KmsMasterKeyId: "alias/aws/sqs"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1209600

  DataDogEventBridgeRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: "DataDogEventBridgeRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: events.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: "DataDogEventBridgePolicy"
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: events:InvokeApiDestination
                Resource: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sqs:SendMessage
                Resource: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn

  DataDogRule:
    Type: AWS::Events::Rule
    Properties:
      Name: "DataDogRule"
      Description: "Rule to forward application events from MyDataDogApp to DataDog"
      EventBusName: !Ref DataDogEventBus
      EventPattern:
        source:
          - "MyDataDogApp"
      State: ENABLED
      Targets:
        - Id: "DataDogApiTarget"
          Arn: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
          RoleArn: !GetAtt DataDogEventBridgeRole.Arn
          DeadLetterConfig:
            Arn: !GetAtt DataDogDLQ.Arn

Outputs:
  EventBusArn:
    Description: "ARN of the custom EventBridge event bus"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBus.Arn
  RuleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the EventBridge rule"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogRule.Arn
  ApiDestinationArn:
    Description: "ARN of the API destination"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogApiDestination.Arn
  ConnectionArn:
    Description: "ARN of the EventBridge connection"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogConnection.Arn
  DLQUrl:
    Description: "URL of the dead-letter queue"
    Value: !Ref DataDogDLQ
  IAMRoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the IAM role used by EventBridge"
    Value: !GetAtt DataDogEventBridgeRole.Arn
