final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: "CloudFormation template for EC2 instances managed by SSM with Auto Scaling Groups for Linux and Windows."
Resources:
  SSMVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: "10.0.0.0/16"
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-VPC
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref SSMVPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.1.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-PublicSubnet1
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref SSMVPC
      CidrBlock: "10.0.2.0/24"
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-PublicSubnet2
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-IGW
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref SSMVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref SSMVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-PublicRouteTable
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: "0.0.0.0/0"
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: "Security group for EC2 instances allowing HTTP and all outbound traffic"
      VpcId: !Ref SSMVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSM-InstanceSG
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: "SSMRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - "arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonEC2RoleforSSM"
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      InstanceProfileName: "SSMInstanceProfile"
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  LinuxLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: "LinuxSSMLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
        InstanceType: t2.micro
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt SSMInstanceProfile.Arn
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            yum install -y amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl enable amazon-ssm-agent
            systemctl start amazon-ssm-agent
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Environment
                Value: Production
              - Key: Project
                Value: SSM-EC2
              - Key: Name
                Value: LinuxSSMInstance

  WindowsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: "WindowsSSMLaunchTemplate"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-windows-latest/Windows_Server-2019-English-Full-Base}}'
        InstanceType: t2.micro
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt SSMInstanceProfile.Arn
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Environment
                Value: Production
              - Key: Project
                Value: SSM-EC2
              - Key: Name
                Value: WindowsSSMInstance

  LinuxAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: "LinuxSSMASG"
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LinuxLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LinuxLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: 2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Name
          Value: LinuxSSMInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

  WindowsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: "WindowsSSMASG"
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref WindowsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt WindowsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: 2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Project
          Value: SSM-EC2
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Name
          Value: WindowsSSMInstance
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: "VPC ID"
    Value: !Ref SSMVPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: "Public Subnet 1 ID"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: "Public Subnet 2 ID"
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: "Security Group ID"
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  LinuxAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: "Linux Auto Scaling Group Name"
    Value: !Ref LinuxAutoScalingGroup
  WindowsAutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: "Windows Auto Scaling Group Name"
    Value: !Ref WindowsAutoScalingGroup

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Multi-tier VPC with public/private subnets, NAT Gateway, and SSM-managed EC2 instances

Parameters:
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI from SSM

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierVPC

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet2

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet2

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierIGW

  AttachGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicRouteTable

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: AttachGateway
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  PublicSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  NatGatewayEIP:
    Type: AWS::EC2::EIP
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatGatewayEIP.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MultiTierNAT

  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      NatGatewayId: !Ref NatGateway

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PublicSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for public instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSecurityGroup

  PrivateSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for private instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !GetAtt PublicSecurityGroup.GroupId
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSecurityGroup

  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: SSMRole

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  PublicInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref PublicSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum update -y
          yum install -y httpd php
          systemctl enable httpd
          systemctl start httpd
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicInstance

  PrivateInstance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSecurityGroup
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateInstance

Outputs:
  PublicInstancePublicIP:
    Description: Public IP address of the public instance
    Value: !GetAtt PublicInstance.PublicIp

  PublicInstancePrivateIP:
    Description: Private IP address of the public instance
    Value: !GetAtt PublicInstance.PrivateIp

  PrivateInstancePrivateIP:
    Description: Private IP address of the private instance
    Value: !GetAtt PrivateInstance.PrivateIp

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Automated Image Analysis Pipeline with S3, Lambda, Step Functions, Rekognition, and SNS'

Parameters:
  ApplicationName:
    Type: String
    Default: ImageAnalysis
    Description: Base name for resources and tags
  PhoneNumber:
    Type: String
    Default: "+15551234567"
    AllowedPattern: ^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$
    Description: Phone number for SMS alerts in E.164 format (e.g., +12065551234). Default is a placeholder; change before deployment.

Resources:
  S3Bucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    DependsOn: LambdaPermission
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      BucketEncryption:
        ServerSideEncryptionConfiguration:
          - ServerSideEncryptionByDefault:
              SSEAlgorithm: AES256
      PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
        BlockPublicAcls: true
        BlockPublicPolicy: true
        IgnorePublicAcls: true
        RestrictPublicBuckets: true
      NotificationConfiguration:
        LambdaConfigurations:
          - Event: s3:ObjectCreated:*
            Function: !GetAtt ImageHandlerFunction.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  ImageHandlerFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-ImageHandler"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt ImageHandlerRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json, boto3, os
          sf = boto3.client('stepfunctions')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              for record in event.get('Records', []):
                  bucket = record['s3']['bucket']['name']
                  key = record['s3']['object']['key']
                  statemachine_arn = os.environ['STATE_MACHINE_ARN']
                  sf.start_execution(
                      stateMachineArn=statemachine_arn,
                      input=json.dumps({'bucket': bucket, 'key': key})
                  )
              return {'statusCode': 200}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          STATE_MACHINE_ARN: !Ref StateMachine
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  ImageHandlerRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-ImageHandlerRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: StartExecutionPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: states:StartExecution
                Resource: !Ref StateMachine
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  LambdaPermission:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Permission
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Ref ImageHandlerFunction
      Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
      Principal: s3.amazonaws.com
      SourceAccount: !Ref "AWS::AccountId"

  SNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-AlertTopic"
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  SNSSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Protocol: sms
      Endpoint: !Ref PhoneNumber
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic

  RekognitionFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-Rekognition"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt RekognitionRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json, boto3
          rek = boto3.client('rekognition')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              bucket = event['bucket']
              key = event['key']
              response = rek.detect_labels(
                  Image={'S3Object': {'Bucket': bucket, 'Name': key}},
                  MaxLabels=10,
                  MinConfidence=75
              )
              human_labels = ['Person', 'Face', 'Human', 'People']
              for label in response['Labels']:
                  if label['Name'] in human_labels:
                      return {'faceDetected': True}
              return {'faceDetected': False}
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  RekognitionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-RekognitionRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RekognitionAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: rekognition:DetectLabels
                Resource: "*"
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  S3BucketPolicy:
    Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
    Properties:
      Bucket: !Ref S3Bucket
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:GetObject
            Resource: !Sub "${S3Bucket.Arn}/*"
            Principal:
              AWS: !GetAtt RekognitionRole.Arn

  SMSFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    Properties:
      FunctionName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-SMS"
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt SMSRole.Arn
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json, boto3, os
          sns = boto3.client('sns')
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              topic_arn = os.environ['SNS_TOPIC_ARN']
              message = "Alert: Human face detected in uploaded image!"
              sns.publish(TopicArn=topic_arn, Message=message)
              return {'status': 'Message sent'}
      Environment:
        Variables:
          SNS_TOPIC_ARN: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  SMSRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-SMSRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: SNSAccess
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: sns:Publish
                Resource: !Ref SNSTopic
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  StateMachine:
    Type: AWS::StepFunctions::StateMachine
    Properties:
      StateMachineName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-ImageAnalysisSM"
      StateMachineType: STANDARD
      RoleArn: !GetAtt StateMachineRole.Arn
      DefinitionString:
        !Sub |
          {
            "Comment": "Image Analysis Pipeline",
            "StartAt": "AnalyzeImage",
            "States": {
              "AnalyzeImage": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${RekognitionFunction.Arn}",
                "ResultPath": "$.analysisResult",
                "Next": "CheckFaces"
              },
              "CheckFaces": {
                "Type": "Choice",
                "Choices": [
                  {
                    "Variable": "$.analysisResult.faceDetected",
                    "BooleanEquals": true,
                    "Next": "SendAlert"
                  }
                ],
                "Default": "SuccessNoFaces"
              },
              "SendAlert": {
                "Type": "Task",
                "Resource": "${SMSFunction.Arn}",
                "End": true
              },
              "SuccessNoFaces": {
                "Type": "Pass",
                "Result": "No human faces detected",
                "End": true
              }
            }
          }
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  StateMachineRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${ApplicationName}-StateMachineRole"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: 2012-10-17
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: states.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: InvokeLambda
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: 2012-10-17
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource:
                  - !GetAtt RekognitionFunction.Arn
                  - !GetAtt SMSFunction.Arn
      Tags:
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket name for uploaded images
    Value: !Ref S3Bucket
  StateMachineArn:
    Description: Step Functions state machine ARN
    Value: !Ref StateMachine
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: SNS topic ARN for SMS alerts
    Value: !Ref SNSTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Jenkins server deployment across multiple AZs using Auto Scaling'

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PublicSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet 1
  PublicSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR block for public subnet 2
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    Description: EC2 instance type for Jenkins
  EnvironmentName:
    Type: String
    Default: prod
    Description: Environment name for tagging
  SSHLocation:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR block allowed to SSH into Jenkins instances
  JenkinsWebLocation:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0
    Description: CIDR block allowed to access Jenkins web UI (port 8080)
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2
    Description: Latest Amazon Linux 2 AMI ID from SSM

Resources:
  # VPC
  JenkinsVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-vpc"

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-public-subnet-1"

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-public-subnet-2"

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-igw"

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-public-rt"

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Network ACL
  PublicNetworkAcl:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAcl
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-nacl"

  InboundRuleSSH:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref SSHLocation
      PortRange:
        From: 22
        To: 22

  InboundRuleJenkins:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 110
      Protocol: 6
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: false
      CidrBlock: !Ref JenkinsWebLocation
      PortRange:
        From: 8080
        To: 8080

  OutboundRuleAll:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NetworkAclEntry
    Properties:
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl
      RuleNumber: 100
      Protocol: -1
      RuleAction: allow
      Egress: true
      CidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  SubnetNetworkAclAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetNetworkAclAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      NetworkAclId: !Ref PublicNetworkAcl

  # Security Group
  JenkinsSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Jenkins instances
      VpcId: !Ref JenkinsVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 8080
          ToPort: 8080
          CidrIp: !Ref JenkinsWebLocation
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-sg"

  # IAM Role and Instance Profile
  JenkinsRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-role"

  JenkinsInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref JenkinsRole

  # Launch Template
  JenkinsLaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-launch-template"
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt JenkinsInstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: 20
              VolumeType: gp3
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -ex
            # Update system
            yum update -y
            # Install Jenkins
            wget -O /etc/yum.repos.d/jenkins.repo https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.repo
            rpm --import https://pkg.jenkins.io/redhat-stable/jenkins.io-2023.key
            yum install -y jenkins java-11-amazon-corretto-devel
            systemctl enable jenkins
            systemctl start jenkins
            # Allow jenkins user to use sudo (optional)
            echo "jenkins ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL" >> /etc/sudoers.d/jenkins
        TagSpecifications:
          - ResourceType: instance
            Tags:
              - Key: Name
                Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-instance"
              - Key: Environment
                Value: !Ref EnvironmentName

  # Auto Scaling Group
  JenkinsAutoScalingGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      AutoScalingGroupName: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-asg"
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref JenkinsLaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt JenkinsLaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      MinSize: 1
      MaxSize: 3
      DesiredCapacity: 1
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref PublicSubnet1
        - !Ref PublicSubnet2
      HealthCheckType: EC2
      HealthCheckGracePeriod: 300
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub "${EnvironmentName}-jenkins-instance"
          PropagateAtLaunch: true
        - Key: Environment
          Value: !Ref EnvironmentName
          PropagateAtLaunch: true

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref JenkinsVPC
  PublicSubnet1Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 1 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicSubnet2Id:
    Description: Public Subnet 2 ID
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet2
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Jenkins Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref JenkinsSecurityGroup
  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Name of the Auto Scaling Group
    Value: !Ref JenkinsAutoScalingGroup
  JenkinsURL:
    Description: >
      To access Jenkins, retrieve the public IP of any running instance in the
      Auto Scaling group and use http://<public-ip>:8080. The ASG name is
      provided above for reference.
    Value: "http://<instance-public-ip>:8080 (see description)"

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'EFS with cross-AZ EC2 instances, monitoring, and SSM management'

Parameters:
  SSHLocation:
    Description: The CIDR IP range that is allowed to SSH into the EC2 instances.
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    AllowedPattern: '(\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}/\d{1,2}'
  BurstCreditThreshold:
    Description: Threshold for BurstCreditBalance alarm in bytes (default 1 TiB).
    Type: Number
    Default: 1099511627776
  PercentIOLimitThreshold:
    Description: Threshold for PercentIOLimit alarm (percentage).
    Type: Number
    Default: 80
  InstanceType:
    Description: EC2 instance type.
    Type: String
    Default: t3.micro
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-VPC

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-IGW

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnets
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Public-Subnet-1

  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Public-Subnet-2

  # Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Public-RT

  DefaultRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  SubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # KMS Key for EFS encryption
  EFSKmsKey:
    Type: AWS::KMS::Key
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: KMS key for EFS encryption
      KeyPolicy:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: Enable IAM User Permissions
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Sub 'arn:aws:iam::${AWS::AccountId}:root'
            Action: 'kms:*'
            Resource: '*'
      Enabled: true

  # EFS File System
  EFSFileSystem:
    Type: AWS::EFS::FileSystem
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Encrypted: true
      KmsKeyId: !Ref EFSKmsKey
      PerformanceMode: generalPurpose
      ThroughputMode: bursting
      FileSystemTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Shared

  # Security Group for EC2 Instances (defined first to avoid circular dependency)
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHLocation
      # No egress to EFS here; will be added as separate rule
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2-SG

  # Security Group for EFS Mount Targets (defined after EC2 SG)
  EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EFS mount targets
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      # No ingress from EC2 here; will be added as separate rule
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-MT-SG

  # Separate ingress rule from EC2 SG to EFS MT SG
  EFSIngressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 2049
      ToPort: 2049
      GroupId: !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  # Separate egress rule from EC2 SG to EFS MT SG
  EC2EgressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupEgress
    Properties:
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 2049
      ToPort: 2049
      GroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  # EFS Mount Targets
  EFSMountTarget1:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  EFSMountTarget2:
    Type: AWS::EFS::MountTarget
    Properties:
      FileSystemId: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroups:
        - !Ref EFSMountTargetSecurityGroup

  # IAM Role for EC2
  EC2Role:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonElasticFileSystemClientReadWriteAccess
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EC2-EFS-SSM-Role

  # Instance Profile
  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref EC2Role

  # EC2 Instances
  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y nfs-utils
          mkdir -p /home
          EFS_DNS="${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
          mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport "$EFS_DNS":/ /home
          echo "$EFS_DNS:/ /home nfs4 nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport,_netdev 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Instance-1

  EC2Instance2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    DependsOn:
      - EFSMountTarget1
      - EFSMountTarget2
    Properties:
      InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref InstanceProfile
      UserData:
        Fn::Base64: !Sub |
          #!/bin/bash
          yum install -y nfs-utils
          mkdir -p /home
          EFS_DNS="${EFSFileSystem}.efs.${AWS::Region}.amazonaws.com"
          mount -t nfs4 -o nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport "$EFS_DNS":/ /home
          echo "$EFS_DNS:/ /home nfs4 nfsvers=4.1,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576,hard,timeo=600,retrans=2,noresvport,_netdev 0 0" >> /etc/fstab
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: EFS-Instance-2

  # SNS Topic for Alarms
  AlarmSNSTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DisplayName: EFS-Alarm-Topic
      TopicName: EFS-Alarm-Topic

  # CloudWatch Alarm: BurstCreditBalance
  BurstCreditAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: EFS-BurstCreditBalance-Alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when BurstCreditBalance falls below threshold
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: BurstCreditBalance
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref BurstCreditThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: LessThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref AlarmSNSTopic

  # CloudWatch Alarm: PercentIOLimit
  PercentIOLimitAlarm:
    Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
    Properties:
      AlarmName: EFS-PercentIOLimit-Alarm
      AlarmDescription: Alarm when PercentIOLimit exceeds threshold
      Namespace: AWS/EFS
      MetricName: PercentIOLimit
      Dimensions:
        - Name: FileSystemId
          Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
      Statistic: Average
      Period: 300
      EvaluationPeriods: 1
      Threshold: !Ref PercentIOLimitThreshold
      ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanThreshold
      AlarmActions:
        - !Ref AlarmSNSTopic

Outputs:
  VPCId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref VPC
  EFSFileSystemId:
    Description: EFS File System ID
    Value: !Ref EFSFileSystem
  EC2Instance1Id:
    Description: EC2 Instance 1 ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance1
  EC2Instance2Id:
    Description: EC2 Instance 2 ID
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance2
  SNSTopicArn:
    Description: SNS Topic ARN for alarms
    Value: !Ref AlarmSNSTopic

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Minimal Redis caching solution with SSM-enabled EC2 access'

Resources:
  # VPC
  VPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-vpc'

  # Internet Gateway
  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-igw'

  VPCGatewayAttachment:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  # Public Subnet
  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-subnet'

  # Private Subnets for ElastiCache
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-1'

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-subnet-2'

  # Public Route Table
  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-public-rt'

  PublicRoute:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Route
    DependsOn: VPCGatewayAttachment
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !Ref InternetGateway

  PublicSubnetRouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable

  # Private Route Table (no default route)
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-private-rt'

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnetRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Groups
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instance (SSM access)
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'

  ElastiCacheSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for ElastiCache Redis
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-elasticache-sg'

  ElastiCacheSecurityGroupIngress:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: 6379
      ToPort: 6379
      SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup

  # IAM Role and Instance Profile for SSM
  SSMRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ssm-role'

  SSMInstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Roles:
        - !Ref SSMRole

  # EC2 Instance
  EC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: '{{resolve:ssm:/aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/amzn2-ami-hvm-x86_64-gp2}}'
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
      IamInstanceProfile: !Ref SSMInstanceProfile
      KeyName: !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-instance'

  # ElastiCache Subnet Group
  ElastiCacheSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::SubnetGroup
    Properties:
      Description: Subnet group for Redis cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2

  # ElastiCache Replication Group (single node Redis)
  RedisReplicationGroup:
    Type: AWS::ElastiCache::ReplicationGroup
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      ReplicationGroupDescription: Minimal Redis cluster
      Engine: redis
      EngineVersion: '7.0'
      CacheNodeType: cache.t3.micro
      NumCacheClusters: 1
      AutomaticFailoverEnabled: false
      SnapshotRetentionLimit: 0
      CacheSubnetGroupName: !Ref ElastiCacheSubnetGroup
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ElastiCacheSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-redis'

Outputs:
  RedisPrimaryEndpoint:
    Description: Primary endpoint address of the Redis cluster
    Value: !GetAtt RedisReplicationGroup.PrimaryEndPoint.Address

  EC2InstanceId:
    Description: ID of the EC2 instance
    Value: !Ref EC2Instance

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Bedrock Agent with Lambda function for stock price lookup'
Mappings:
  ModelIdMap:
    Claude3Sonnet:
      ModelId: 'anthropic.claude-3-sonnet-20240229'
Resources:
  LambdaExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'StockPriceLambdaExecutionRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - 'arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AWSLambdaBasicExecutionRole'
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaLoggingPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:*'

  StockPriceFunction:
    Type: AWS::Lambda::Function
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      FunctionName: 'StockPriceFunction'
      Runtime: python3.12
      Handler: index.lambda_handler
      Role: !GetAtt LambdaExecutionRole.Arn
      Environment:
        Variables:
          KEY: ''
      Code:
        ZipFile: |
          import json
          def lambda_handler(event, context):
              return {
                  'statusCode': 200,
                  'body': json.dumps({"stockPrice": 100})
              }

  AgentRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: 'BedrockAgentRole'
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: bedrock.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: BedrockAgentPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - bedrock:InvokeModel
                Resource: !Sub
                  - 'arn:aws:bedrock:${AWS::Region}::foundation-model/${modelId}'
                  - modelId: !FindInMap [ModelIdMap, Claude3Sonnet, ModelId]
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - lambda:InvokeFunction
                Resource: !GetAtt StockPriceFunction.Arn
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - logs:CreateLogGroup
                  - logs:CreateLogStream
                  - logs:PutLogEvents
                Resource: 'arn:aws:logs:*:*:*'

  StockPriceAgent:
    Type: AWS::Bedrock::Agent
    Properties:
      AgentName: 'StockPriceAgent'
      AgentResourceRoleArn: !GetAtt AgentRole.Arn
      FoundationModel: !FindInMap [ModelIdMap, Claude3Sonnet, ModelId]
      Instruction: |
        You are a stock price lookup agent. When a user asks for the current price of a stock, use the getStockPrice action by providing the stock symbol as a required parameter. Return the stock price to the user.
      ActionGroups:
        - ActionGroupName: 'StockPriceActionGroup'
          ActionGroupExecutor:
            Lambda: !GetAtt StockPriceFunction.Arn
          FunctionSchema:
            Functions:
              - Name: getStockPrice
                Description: 'Retrieves the current stock price for a given symbol.'
                Parameters:
                  symbol:
                    Description: 'The stock ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT).'
                    Type: string
                    Required: true

final_template:
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Aurora MySQL cluster with RDS Proxy, VPC, security, and monitoring'

Parameters:
  VpcCIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.0.0/16
    Description: CIDR block for the VPC
  PrivateSubnet1CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.1.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private subnet 1
  PrivateSubnet2CIDR:
    Type: String
    Default: 10.0.2.0/24
    Description: CIDR for private subnet 2
  DBInstanceClass:
    Type: String
    Default: db.r5.large
    Description: Instance class for Aurora instances
  BackupRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 7
    Description: Number of days to retain backups
  PreferredMaintenanceWindow:
    Type: String
    Default: 'sun:03:00-sun:04:00'
    Description: Weekly maintenance window
  PreferredBackupWindow:
    Type: String
    Default: '02:00-03:00'
    Description: Daily backup window
  MonitoringInterval:
    Type: Number
    Default: 60
    Description: Interval in seconds for enhanced monitoring
  ProxyIdleClientTimeout:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1800
    Description: Idle client timeout in seconds for RDS Proxy
  ProxyMaxConnectionsPercent:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    Description: Maximum connections percent for RDS Proxy (used in target group)
  ProxySessionPinningFilters:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Default: 'EXCLUDE_VARIABLE_SETS'
    Description: Session pinning filters for RDS Proxy (used in target group)
  LogRetentionDays:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    Description: Retention days for CloudWatch log groups

Resources:
  # VPC
  AuroraVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: !Ref VpcCIDR
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraVPC

  # Private Subnets
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet1CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [0, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet1'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private

  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PrivateSubnet2CIDR
      AvailabilityZone: !Select [1, !GetAZs '']
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateSubnet2'
        - Key: Type
          Value: Private

  # Route Table and Associations
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-PrivateRouteTable'

  PrivateSubnet1RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  PrivateSubnet2RouteTableAssociation:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable

  # Security Groups
  LambdaSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Lambda functions
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: LambdaSecurityGroup

  AuroraSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for Aurora cluster
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          CidrIp: !Ref VpcCIDR
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraSecurityGroup

  RdsProxySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for RDS Proxy
      VpcId: !Ref AuroraVPC
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          SourceSecurityGroupId: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 3306
          ToPort: 3306
          DestinationSecurityGroupId: !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: RdsProxySecurityGroup

  # Secrets Manager Secret
  AuroraMasterSecret:
    Type: AWS::SecretsManager::Secret
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Description: Master credentials for Aurora MySQL cluster
      GenerateSecretString:
        SecretStringTemplate: '{"username":"admin"}'
        GenerateStringKey: 'password'
        PasswordLength: 32
        ExcludeCharacters: '!@#$%^&*()_+-=[]{}|;:,.<>?/~`/\ "'
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraMasterSecret

  # IAM Roles
  RDSMonitoringRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RDSMonitoringRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: monitoring.rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/service-role/AmazonRDSEnhancedMonitoringRole

  RDSProxySecretRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RDSProxySecretRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: GetSecretValue
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: secretsmanager:GetSecretValue
                Resource: !Sub 'arn:aws:secretsmanager:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:secret:AuroraMasterSecret-*'

  RDSProxyIAMAuthRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: RDSProxyIAMAuthRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: rds.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: RDSAuthConnect
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action: rds-db:connect
                Resource:
                  Fn::Sub:
                    - 'arn:aws:rds-db:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:dbuser:${ClusterResourceId}/admin'
                    - ClusterResourceId: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.DBClusterResourceId

  # DB Subnet Group
  AuroraDBSubnetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBSubnetGroup
    Properties:
      DBSubnetGroupDescription: Subnet group for Aurora cluster
      SubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraSubnetGroup

  # Aurora Cluster
  AuroraCluster:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBCluster
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      DBClusterIdentifier: AuroraCluster
      MasterUsername: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${AuroraMasterSecret}::username}}'
      MasterUserPassword: !Sub '{{resolve:secretsmanager:${AuroraMasterSecret}::password}}'
      BackupRetentionPeriod: !Ref BackupRetentionDays
      PreferredMaintenanceWindow: !Ref PreferredMaintenanceWindow
      PreferredBackupWindow: !Ref PreferredBackupWindow
      DBSubnetGroupName: !Ref AuroraDBSubnetGroup
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
      StorageEncrypted: true
      EnableIAMDatabaseAuthentication: true
      EnableCloudwatchLogsExports:
        - audit
        - error
        - general
        - slowquery
      DeletionProtection: true
      CopyTagsToSnapshot: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraCluster

  # Writer Instance
  AuroraWriterInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: AuroraWriterInstance
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      PromotionTier: 1
      MonitoringInterval: !Ref MonitoringInterval
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt RDSMonitoringRole.Arn
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PerformanceInsightsRetentionPeriod: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraWriterInstance

  # Reader Instance
  AuroraReaderInstance:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBInstance
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      DBInstanceIdentifier: AuroraReaderInstance
      DBClusterIdentifier: !Ref AuroraCluster
      DBInstanceClass: !Ref DBInstanceClass
      Engine: aurora-mysql
      PubliclyAccessible: false
      AutoMinorVersionUpgrade: true
      PromotionTier: 0
      MonitoringInterval: !Ref MonitoringInterval
      MonitoringRoleArn: !GetAtt RDSMonitoringRole.Arn
      EnablePerformanceInsights: true
      PerformanceInsightsRetentionPeriod: 7
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraReaderInstance

  # RDS Proxy
  AuroraProxy:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxy
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: AuroraProxy
      EngineFamily: MYSQL
      Auth:
        - AuthScheme: SECRETS
          SecretArn: !Ref AuroraMasterSecret
          IAMAuth: REQUIRED
      RequireTLS: true
      IdleClientTimeout: !Ref ProxyIdleClientTimeout
      VpcSecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref RdsProxySecurityGroup
      VpcSubnetIds:
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet1
        - !Ref PrivateSubnet2
      RoleArn: !GetAtt RDSProxySecretRole.Arn
      DebugLogging: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: AuroraProxy

  # RDS Proxy Target Group
  AuroraProxyTargetGroup:
    Type: AWS::RDS::DBProxyTargetGroup
    Properties:
      DBProxyName: !Ref AuroraProxy
      TargetGroupName: default
      DBClusterIdentifiers:
        - !Ref AuroraCluster
      ConnectionPoolConfigurationInfo:
        MaxConnectionsPercent: !Ref ProxyMaxConnectionsPercent
        SessionPinningFilters: !Ref ProxySessionPinningFilters
        InitQuery: 'SET SESSION sql_mode = CONCAT(@@sql_mode, ",", "NO_ENGINE_SUBSTITUTION")'

  # CloudWatch Log Groups for Aurora Cluster Logs
  AuditLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/rds/cluster/${AuroraCluster}/audit'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays

  ErrorLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/rds/cluster/${AuroraCluster}/error'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays

  GeneralLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/rds/cluster/${AuroraCluster}/general'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays

  SlowQueryLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/rds/cluster/${AuroraCluster}/slowquery'
      RetentionInDays: !Ref LogRetentionDays

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: VPC ID
    Value: !Ref AuroraVPC
  PrivateSubnetIds:
    Description: Private subnet IDs
    Value: !Join [',', [!Ref PrivateSubnet1, !Ref PrivateSubnet2]]
  AuroraSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security group ID for Aurora cluster
    Value: !Ref AuroraSecurityGroup
  RdsProxySecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security group ID for RDS Proxy
    Value: !Ref RdsProxySecurityGroup
  LambdaSecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security group ID for Lambda functions
    Value: !Ref LambdaSecurityGroup
  AuroraClusterEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster writer endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.Endpoint.Address
  AuroraReaderEndpoint:
    Description: Aurora cluster reader endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraCluster.ReadEndpoint.Address
  RDSProxyEndpoint:
    Description: RDS Proxy endpoint
    Value: !GetAtt AuroraProxy.Endpoint
  RDSProxyTargetGroupArn:
    Description: ARN of the RDS Proxy target group
    Value: !Ref AuroraProxyTargetGroup
  SecretArn:
    Description: ARN of the master secret
    Value: !Ref AuroraMasterSecret
